title: Crispy Tunisian Ham Stir-fry
description: A tangy and crunchy weeknight dish featuring crispy ham slices marinated in a blend of lemon juice, garlic, and herbs for added flavor and safety.
instructions: Prepare the marinate by mixing lemon juice, garlic paste, and a pinch of salt in a bowl.
Place the ham pieces on a plate or baking sheet and coat them evenly with the marinade. Let it sit at room temperature for about 15 minutes to allow flavors to penetrate.
While the ham is marinating, heat the olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Remove the ham from the marinade and place it onto the hot skillet; cook on each side until golden-brown and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
In the meantime, finely chop the mint leaves. Add the red onion slices to the pan along with some of the marinate juices for added moisture and flavor. Stir-fry gently for a minute or two.
Garnish the crispy ham with chopped mint leaves before serving, optionally accompanied by lemon wedges.
